title: What's new in Cloud SQL: Drive performance, high availability, and security
summary: Google Cloud SQL adds AI-driven automated health management and fleet-wide insights for MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server databases. The update emphasizes performance optimization, high availability, security enhancements, and low-risk cloud migration via Database Migration Service.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video covers new Cloud SQL capabilities across MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server, centered on AI-driven automated health management and fleet-wide insights. The features target performance optimization, high availability, and security, alongside low-risk migration through Database Migration Service. The concrete takeaways: automated database health management, monitoring spanning an entire fleet, and a managed migration path into Cloud SQL.
